sessions.title: Sentinel Phase 1 — Multi-repo deployment
work_packages: WP-0: Repo migration to huanlongAI org (16 repos)
WP-1.5: tzhOS caller template (119-line inline → 25-line reusable)
WP-2: D-4~D-6 precheck scripts (directory, capability-source, brand-token)
WP-3: LLM review layer — real Claude API integration
WP-4: Batch deployment to all 16 huanlongAI repos
sessions.summary: Deployed Consistency Sentinel CI/CD across entire huanlongAI org. Hub-and-spoke architecture: sentinel-shared (public) hosts reusable workflow + scripts; each repo has ~25-line caller + .sentinel/config.yaml. Four config profiles: governance, infra, app, library. Six deterministic prechecks (D-1~D-6) + LLM review layer with graceful degradation.
key_decisions: permissions must be in caller, never in reusable workflow (startup_failure)
sentinel-shared must be public (GITHUB_TOKEN scope limitation)
LLM failures produce ESCALATE verdict, not FAIL (non-blocking)
Repo name cannot start with dot (GitHub uses: directive parse failure)

sessions.title: Custom Skills — sentinel-ops & governance-workflow
work_packages: sentinel-ops skill: Sentinel CI/CD operational knowledge base (313 lines, ~2900 tokens)
governance-workflow skill: Governance automation workflows (231 lines, ~2050 tokens)
sessions.summary: Created and packaged two domain-specific Cowork skills encoding all operational knowledge from Sentinel Phase 1. sentinel-ops covers deployment, debugging, config profiles, script patterns, and batch operations. governance-workflow covers ruling creation, spec sign-off, PROGRESS tracking, Obsidian sync, and cascade verification. Both installed and verified in Cowork environment.

context_impact.assessment: No negative impact on Harness Engineering context budget
